generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and taxpayer, I've always believed in being prepared. But why are we spending billions on civil defense when our real neighbors need help? I've seen firsthand how these programs drain resources from schools and hospitals. Let's focus on what truly keeps us safe: strong communities and smart investments. #CommonSenseFirst #NeighborhoodWatch
